laws.title: Tennessee Minimum Wage — $7.25/hr (Federal Rate, No State Law)
laws.summary: Tennessee has no state minimum wage law. Employers must comply with the federal minimum wage of $7.25 per hour under the Fair Labor Standards Act. Tipped employees may be paid $2.13/hour by the employer provided tips bring total compensation to at least $7.25/hour.
compliance_actions: Pay all non-exempt employees at least $7.25/hour as required by the federal FLSA
For tipped employees, ensure employer-paid wage plus tips equals at least $7.25/hour
Post the federal FLSA minimum wage poster in a visible workplace location
Ensure compliance with federal overtime requirements (1.5x regular rate for hours over 40/week)
laws.source: U.S. Department of Labor — Wage and Hour Division
